events.name: Cleveland Cavaliers at New York Knicks

highlights.headline: Knicks dominate Cavs, take 2-0 series lead
highlights.description: Josh Hart and the Knicks take down the Cavaliers 109-93 to go up 2-0 in the Eastern Conference finals.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Knicks dominate Cavs, take 2-0 series lead) 2026/05/22 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Josh Hart scored a playoff career-high 26 points, Jalen Brunson had 19 points and 14 assists, and the New York Knicks moved halfway to their first NBA Finals appearance since 1999 by beating the Cleveland Cavaliers 109-93 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks move 2 wins from the NBA Finals with a 109-93 victory over the Cavs

video.headline: Knicks dominate Cavs, take 2-0 series lead
